entity.description:
• Non-Comedogenic, Oil-Free And Fragrance-Free.
• Developed With Dermatologists.
• Accepted By The National Eczema Association.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Lightweight, oil-free moisturizer that helps hydrate the skin and restore its natural barrier.
• Formulated with 3 essential ceramides that work together to lock in skins moisture and help restore your skin’s protective barrier.
• Leaves the skin feeling comfortable and is gentle on the skin as it provides 24-hour hydration.

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Directions:
•1. Apply the Cerave Moisturising Lotion on your face after cleansing with the Cerave Hydrating Cleanser.
•2. Massage the lightweight formula onto face, neck and can be applied on the body.
•3. Use daily on face and body for best results.
• Caution:
•1. For external use only.

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:

metaData.Key Information:
QV Skin Lotion replenishes and soothes dry skin. For best results apply after your bath or shower.
• Helps seal in natural moisture by acting as a protective barrier.
• pH balanced, low-irritant formulation, free from fragrance, colour, lanolin and propylene glycol.
• Suitable for even sensitive skin types.
• Particularly suitable for infants and the elderly.
metaData.Preparation: Apply to affected areas as often as required, particularly after showering, bathing, shaving, exposure to harsh climatic conditions and at night.

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
This high-tolerance daily care product, composed of 97% ingredients of natural origin, helps strengthen the skin barrier of the face and body. A moisturizing and nourishing lotion for sensitive and very dry skin, suitable for the whole family, it includes milk thistle oil, which supports the synthesis of ceramides for improved skin hydration. Its lightly scented, comfortable texture combines the richness of a cream with the fluid texture of a lotion for easy application and fast absorption. It soothes tightness, nourishes, and moisturizes. XERACALM NUTRITION Moisturizing Lotion is an environmentally responsible product. Its 400ml packaging contains 70% recycled material, and the bottle is made of 100% recycled plastic**.
*Instrumental test, 30 subjects, twice a day for 7 days.
**Excluding the pump.

metaData.Ingredients: Avene Thermal Spring Water (Avene Aqua). Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride. Glycerin. Polyglyceryl-2 Dipolyhydroxystearate. Niacinamide. Pentaerythrityl Tetracaprylate/Tetracaprate. Behenyl Alcohol. Benzoic Acid. Caprylyl Glycol. Fragrance (Parfum). Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil (Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil). Hydroxyethylcellulose. Lauryl Glucoside. Silybum Marianum Seed Oil. Sodium Citrate. Sodium Lauryl Glucose Carboxylate. Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate. Sorbic Acid. Tocopherol. Water (Aqua). Xanthan Gum
metaData.Key Information: High Tolerance daily lotion that intensely Nourishes and Hydrates the skin for up to 48 hours* ( For dry skin / sensitive skin )
metaData.Preparation: Apply 1 to 2 times a day after cleansing skin.

metaData.SAP Product Name: AVEENO DAILY MOISTURIZING CREAMY OIL LOTION 300ML

product.name: Aveeno Daily Moisturising Creamy Oil Lotion - Almond

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
1. Cetaphil Daily Moisturising Cream for Dry to Very Dry Skin: Instantly replenishes, intensely nourishes and soothes skin dryness for 48 hours
2. Clinically Proven to Restore Skin's Moisture Barrier in 1 Week: Binds water to the skin, preventing moisture loss to hydrate and protect skin from dryness
3. New and Improved Ingredient Blend: Now with hydrating glycerin and skin essential vitamin B3 (niacinamide) and pro-vitamin B5 (panthenol)
4. Developed for Even the Most Sensitive Skin: The hypoallergenic, non-comedogenic formula is fragrance free and paraben free
5. From the #1 Dermatologist Recommended Facial Skincare Brand
6. Defends Against 5 Signs of Skin Sensitivity: Dryness, irritation, roughness, tightness and a weakened skin barrier

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Petrolatum, Dicaprylyl Ether, Dimethicone, Glyceryl Stearate, Cetyl Alcohol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Peg-30 Stearate, Panthenol, Niacinamide, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Tocopherol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Pantolactone, Propylene Glycol, Bht, Disodium Edta, Benzyl Alcohol, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Hydroxide, Citric Acid, Fi.1765.V01
metaData.Key Information: Care for your dry to very dry skin with CETAPHIL Moisturizing Cream, a non-greasy, moisture rich cream for the whole body. Enriched with sweet almond oil and vitamin E, it immediately comforts and instantly hydrates dry, sensitive skin. Formulated with a new blend of key ingredients: hydrating glycerin, panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) to hydrate, soothe and preserve the skin barrier, and niacinamide (vitamin B3) to help smooth skin’s texture and retain skin’s moisture barrier. For long lasting hydration, this extra strength moisturizer binds water to the skin to intensely replenish the skin's moisture and prevent moisture loss, hydrating and soothing skin's dryness for 48 hours and completely restoring the skin's moisture barrier in one week. Ideal for very dry areas of skin on the hands, feet, elbows and knees, leaving your skin feeling soft, smooth and nourished. This fragrance free, paraben free formula won't clog pores and is clinically tested for even the most gentle skin. Effectively defends against 5 signs of skin sensitivity.
metaData.Preparation: Smooth generously to hydrate and protect skin
metaData.Storage Information: For external use only. Store below 30°C

product.name: Cetaphil Daily Moisturising Cream

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
1. Micellar Technology absorbs makeup, sebum & dirt from deep within pores. Easy makeup removal lifts makeup without harsh rubbing.
2. Hydrating formula with aloe vera extract.
3. Suitable even for sensitive skin - face & eyes.
- Gentle cleansing for sensitive skin & eyes
- Natural skin pH formula for healthy skin barrier

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Dipropylene Glycol, Peg-12 Laurate, Butylene Glycol, Peg/Ppg/Polybutylene Glycol-8/5/3 Glycerin, Peg-8, Peg-6 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Methyl Stearoyl Taurate, Citric Acid, Methylparaben, Disodium Edta, O-Cymen-5-Ol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract
metaData.Key Information: Micellar Cleansing Water Moisturizing 400ml (For sensitive dry to normal skin, with aloe vera extract)
metaData.Preparation: Use soaked cotton pad to gently wipe off makeup. For eye makeup, place soaked cotton pad onto closed eyes and hold for 5 seconds before gently wiping off.
metaData.Storage Information: Remove contact lenses before use. If eye irritation occurs, rinse immediately with water. If skin irritation occurs, discontinue use and consult a doctor. Keep away from heat and sunlight.
